transcript: Speaker A (AI): काय करतेस [What are you doing?] Speaker B (Human): हाय... अ... [Hi... uh...] Speaker A (AI): तुला yawning म्हणजे जांभई येतेय म्हणायचं आहे का? [Do you mean you are yawning?] Speaker B (Human): अरे हो, मला नीट English येत नाही. [Oh yes, I don't know English well.] Speaker A (AI): माझ्यासोबत दररोज फक्त १०-१५ मिनिटे practice केलीस तर फक्त एका महिन्यात तू confidently English बोलू शकतेस. [If you practice with me for just 10-15 minutes daily, you can speak English confidently in just one month.] Speaker B (Human): पण ते महाग असेल ना? [But it must be expensive, right?] Speaker A (AI): अजिबात नाही! फक्त १ रुपयात तू हा app पूर्ण try करून पाहू शकतेस. म्हणून १ कोटी लोक माझ्यासोबत English शिकत आहेत. [Not at all! You can try this entire app for just 1 rupee. That's why 1 crore people are learning English with me.] Speaker B (Human): Wow! कसं join करू? [Wow! How do I join?] Speaker A (AI): आत्ताच MySivi app download कर आणि English शिकायला सुरुवात कर. [Download the MySivi app right now and start learning English.]
on_screen_text: काय करतेस [What are you doing?], म्हणजे जांभई [Meaning yawning], येतेय म्हणायचं [Wanting to say it's coming], अरे हो [Oh yes], मग English कसं [Then how English], माझ्यासोबत दररोज [With me daily], 10-15 MINUTES, practice केलीस [if you practice], फक्त एका महिन्यात [in just one month], English बोलू [speak English], पण महाग [But expensive], असेल ना [it will be, right?], अजिबात नाही [Not at all], ₹1, Limited time offer, Autopay, cancel anytime, 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access, तू हा app [you this app], try करून [by trying], पाहू शकतेस [can see], म्हणून [Therefore], १ कोटी [1 crore], लोक [people], माझ्यासोबत [with me], English शिकत [learning English], आहेत [are], कसं join करू [How to join?], आत्ताच MySivi [Right now MySivi], app download [app download], कर [do], आणि English [and English], शिकायला [to learn], सुरुवात कर [start]
summary: A Marathi-speaking woman struggles to find the English word for yawning, and an AI avatar corrects her. The AI explains that practicing 10-15 minutes daily on the MySivi app will make her fluent in a month. The ad highlights a 1-rupee trial offer and urges users to download the app.
